title: MAP 6.13: Add gap scoring, task tiers, and local-helper lanes
description: Wave 5 from MAP 6.13 plan. Define gap scoring, task_tier, local_lane, escalation_reason, emergence preflight suggestions, local-helper lane wrappers, and bounded learning guard. Read MAP_System/artifacts/planning/map-613-master-implementation-plan.md, MAP_System/CONTEXT_SYSTEM.md, MAP_System/emergence/README.md, MAP_System/notes/local-model-helper-guide.md, MAP_System/scripts/local_runner.py, and Guidelines/6.13/files6/MAP-Simulation-Results-Round5.md before editing.
acceptance_criteria: Task-tiering spec defines gap_score, task_tier, local_lane, escalation_reason, and promotion/dispatch expectations.
Emergence preflight spec defines capability pass, coverage pass, suggestion confidence, and when suggestions must not be silently added.
Local-helper lanes are draft-only and include repo scan, JSON/schema check, event digest, validator-log summary, markdown cleanup, and acceptance-criteria draft.
Learning-guard spec prunes heuristics that fire without preventing real defects and explains how outcome feedback can override validator-only learning.
